CREATE TABLE ftp_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, file_name VARCHAR(255), file_size INT);
INSERT INTO ftp_test (id, file_name, file_size) VALUES (1, 'file_a.txt', 1024);
INSERT INTO ftp_test (id, file_name, file_size) VALUES (2, 'file_b.txt', 2048);
INSERT INTO ftp_test (id, file_name, file_size) VALUES (3, 'file_c.txt', 2048);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ftp_test WHERE file_size > (SELECT AVG(file_size) FROM ftp_test);
SELECT file_name FROM ftp_test WHERE file_size = (SELECT MAX(file_size) FROM ftp_test WHERE file_size < 2048);
SELECT id, file_name FROM ftp_test WHERE file_size IN (SELECT file_size FROM ftp_test WHERE file_name LIKE '%file_%') ORDER BY file_size DESC;
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ftp_test) AS total_files, (SELECT SUM(file_size) FROM ftp_test) AS total_size;
SELECT id, file_name FROM ftp_test WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM ftp_test WHERE file_size > 1500 LIMIT 1);
SELECT file_name, file_size FROM ftp_test WHERE file_size BETWEEN (SELECT MIN(file_size) FROM ftp_test) AND (SELECT MAX(file_size) FROM ftp_test);
SELECT dbg_obj_print(ftp_ls('ftp.openlinksw.com', 'user_name', 'password', 'virtuoso30')) AS ftp_output, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ftp_test) AS total_rows;
